shortFormVideo.hook: Before you connect AI to company documents, decide what it is allowed to see.
script: A local RAG system should not start with model shopping.
Start with one workflow: SOP lookup, policy search, client history, finance review, or onboarding.
Separate public, internal, client, finance, and staff-only documents.
Make every answer cite the source document so staff can verify it.
Then use the EB28 project brief to turn the idea into a scoped private AI build.
shortFormVideo.visualBrief: 30-45 seconds. Screen-record a simple document-permission map, then cut to a source-cited answer example and end on the Melbourne Web Studio project brief CTA.
